---
title: "Exercise 2: External PPG Debt by Creditor Class"
subtitle: "BP3 — Fund's Role in International Debt Architecture"
output: html_notebook
---

# Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(openxlsx)
library(scales)
cat("✓ Libraries loaded\n")
```

```{r paths}
ids_dir    <- "U:/dil/bp3/input/data/data/IDS"
characteristics_dir   <- "U:/dil/main-characteristics"
output_dir <- "U:/dil/bp3/output"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

---

# Load and combine all 6 IDS files

This will take a few minutes per file.

```{r load-ids}
files <- c("A_D.xlsx", "E_K.xlsx", "L_M.xlsx", "N_Q.xlsx", "R_U.xlsx", "V_Z.xlsx")

ids_list <- list()
for (f in files) {
  cat("Loading", f, "...\n")
  ids_list[[f]] <- read.xlsx(file.path(ids_dir, f))
  cat("  ✓", format(nrow(ids_list[[f]]), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")
}

year_cols <- names(ids_list[[1]])[grepl("^\\d{4}$", names(ids_list[[1]]))]

for (i in seq_along(ids_list)) {
  ids_list[[i]][year_cols] <- lapply(ids_list[[i]][year_cols], as.character)
}

ids_raw <- bind_rows(ids_list)
rm(ids_list)
gc()

cat("✓ Combined:", format(nrow(ids_raw), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")

cat("\n✓ Combined:", format(nrow(ids_raw), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")
cat("Countries:", n_distinct(ids_raw$Country.Name), "\n")
cat("Series:", n_distinct(ids_raw$Series.Code), "\n")
```
---

---
# Filter to key series only

Keep only what we need — saves memory and speeds up everything.

```{r filter-series}
keep_series <- c(
  "DT.DOD.BLAT.CD",   # PPG bilateral DOD
  "DT.DOD.MLAT.CD",   # PPG multilateral DOD
  "DT.DOD.PBND.CD",   # PPG bonds DOD
  "DT.DOD.PCBK.CD",   # PPG commercial banks DOD
  "DT.DOD.PROP.CD",   # PPG other private creditors
  "DT.DOD.DIMF.CD",   # IMF credit DOD
  "DT.DOD.DPPG.CD"    # Total PPG DOD (cross-check)
)

ids_raw <- ids_raw %>% filter(Series.Code %in% keep_series)
cat("Filtered to key series:", format(nrow(ids_raw), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")

```
---

---

# Remove regional aggregates

```{r remove-aggregates}
remove_these <- c(
  "East Asia & Pacific (excluding high income)",
  "Europe & Central Asia (excluding high income)",
  "IDA only",
  "IDA total",
  "Latin America & Caribbean (excluding high income)",
  "Least developed countries: UN classification",
  "Low & middle income",
  "Low income",
  "Lower middle income",
  "Middle East & North Africa (excluding high income)",
  "Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan & Pakistan (excluding high income)",
  "Middle income",
  "South Asia",
  "Sub-Saharan Africa (excluding high income)",
  "Upper middle income",
  "Heavily indebted poor countries (HIPC)",
  "World"
)

ids_raw <- ids_raw %>% filter(!Country.Name %in% remove_these)
cat("After removing aggregates:", n_distinct(ids_raw$Country.Name), "countries\n")
```

---
# Reshape to long format

```{r reshape}
# Reshape: de wide (años como columnas) a long (una fila por año)
year_cols <- names(ids_raw)[grepl("^\\d{4}$", names(ids_raw))]

ids_long <- ids_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(year_cols), names_to = "year", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year),
         value = as.numeric(value)) %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2024, !is.na(value)) %>%
  rename(country_code = Country.Code,
         country_name = Country.Name,
         ca_name = `Counterpart-Area.Name`,
         ca_code = `Counterpart-Area.Code`,
         series_name = Series.Name,
         series_code = Series.Code)

rm(ids_raw)
gc()
cat("✓ ids_long:", format(nrow(ids_long), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")

#eliminando el espacio en blanco de al inicio y final
ids_long <- ids_long %>% mutate(ca_name = trimws(ca_name))

```

---

# PRGT load reference and classify

```{r load-prgt-list}
# Load reference lists
prgt_members <- trimws(readLines(file.path(characteristics_dir, "prgt-members.txt"), warn = FALSE))
prgt_members <- prgt_members[prgt_members != ""]
cat("PRGT members:", length(prgt_members), "\n")

#Classify
ids_long <- ids_long %>%
  mutate(income_group = case_when(
    country_name %in% prgt_members ~ "LIC",
    TRUE ~ "MIC"
    )
  )
cat("LIC:", n_distinct(ids_long$country_name[ids_long$income_group == "LIC"]), "\n")

cat("MIC:", n_distinct(ids_long$country_name[ids_long$income_group == "MIC"]), "\n")
#⚠ Unmatched PRGT: (esta lista son paises que no estan en ids)
# ✗ Côte d'Ivoire (si esta pero en el ids esta: "Cote d'Ivoire")
# ✗ Kiribati (no esta)
# ✗ Marshall Islands (no esta)
# ✗ Micronesia, Federated States of (no esta)
# ✗ Somalia (esta como Somalia, Fed. Rep.)
# ✗ South Sudan (no esta)
#✗ Tuvalu (no esta)

matched <- ids_long %>% filter(income_group == "LIC") %>% distinct(country_name) %>% pull()
cat("Matched LICs:\n")
for (c in sort(matched)) cat("  ✓", c, "\n")

```

---


# Paris Club reference and classify

```{r load-pc-list}
pc_mapping <- tribble(
  ~ca_code,  ~pc_name,              ~accession_year,
  "801",     "Australia",           1956,
  "001",     "Austria",             1956,
  "002",     "Belgium",             1956,
  "301",     "Canada",              1956,
  "003",     "Denmark",             1956,
  "018",     "Finland",             1956,
  "004",     "France",              1956,
  "005",     "Germany, Fed. Rep.",   1956,
  "021",     "Ireland",             1956,
  "006",     "Italy",               1956,
  "701",     "Japan",               1956,
  "007",     "Netherlands",         1956,
  "008",     "Norway",              1956,
  "050",     "Spain",               1956,
  "010",     "Sweden",              1956,
  "011",     "Switzerland",         1956,
  "012",     "United Kingdom",      1956,
  "302",     "United States",       1956,
  "087",     "Russian Federation",  1997,
  "546",     "Israel",              2014,
  "742",     "Korea, Republic of",  2016,
  "431",     "Brazil",              2016
)

# Verify all match in bilateral data
bilat_ca <- ids_long %>% filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.BLAT.CD") %>% distinct(ca_code)
cat("PC matched:", sum(pc_mapping$ca_code %in% bilat_ca$ca_code), "of", nrow(pc_mapping), "\n")

```
---
# Explore counterpart areas

```{r explore-multilateral-counterparts}
cat("--- Counterpart areas for MULTILATERAL (DT.DOD.MLAT.CD) ---\n\n")
ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.MLAT.CD") %>%
  distinct(ca_name, ca_code) %>%
  arrange(ca_name) %>%
  { for (i in 1:nrow(.)) cat(" ", .$ca_code[i], ":", .$ca_name[i], "\n"); . } %>%
  invisible()

```

---
```{r load-pcs-list}
pcs_codes <- c(
  "901",  # World Bank-IBRD
  "905",  # World Bank-IDA
  "902",  # World Bank-MIGA
  "903",  # IFC
  "988",  # IFAD
  "911",  # BIS
  "990",  # EBRD
  "913",  # African Dev. Bank
  "915",  # Asian Dev. Bank
  "909",  # Inter-American Dev. Bank
  "899",  # AIIB
  "926",  # Council of Europe
  "906",  # Caribbean Dev. Bank
  "919",  # European Investment Bank
  "957",  # BOAD
  "887",  # NDB
  "976",  # Islamic Dev. Bank
  "920",  # CAF
  "951",  # OPEC Fund
  "973",  # Arab Monetary Fund
  "953"   # BADEA
)

# Verify all match in multilateral data
mlat_ca <- ids_long %>% filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.MLAT.CD") %>% distinct(ca_code)
cat("PCS matched:", sum(pcs_codes %in% mlat_ca$ca_code), "of", length(pcs_codes), "\n")

#no estan;
#European Financial Stability Mechanism, Eurosystem, European Stability Mechanism, Chiang Mai Initiative, BRICS Contingent Reserve, Black Sea Trade and Dev. Bank
```


---
```{r blat-classification}
# PC bilateral: suma de creditors individuales que son PC
bilateral_pc <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.BLAT.CD",
         ca_code %in% pc_mapping$ca_code) %>%
  left_join(pc_mapping %>% select(ca_code, accession_year), by = "ca_code") %>%
  mutate(
    creditor_class = case_when(
      year >= accession_year ~ "Bilateral: Paris Club",
      TRUE ~ "Bilateral: Non-Paris Club"
    )
  )

# Total bilateral por país-año (WLD)
bilateral_total <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.BLAT.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, bilateral_total = value)

cat("PC rows:", nrow(bilateral_pc), "\n")
cat("Total bilateral rows:", nrow(bilateral_total), "\n")
```

---
```{r blat-calculation}
# Suma de PC por país-año
pc_sum <- bilateral_pc %>%
  filter(creditor_class == "Bilateral: Paris Club") %>%
  group_by(country_name, country_code, year, income_group) %>%
  summarise(pc_value = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Non-PC = total - PC
bilateral_nonpc <- bilateral_total %>%
  left_join(pc_sum, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  mutate(
    pc_value = replace_na(pc_value, 0),
    nonpc_value = bilateral_total - pc_value
  )

cat("Rows:", nrow(bilateral_nonpc), "\n")

#contar cuantos negativos.
   bilateral_nonpc %>% 
     filter(nonpc_value < 0) %>%
     summarise(
       n = n(),
       min = min(nonpc_value),
       median = median(nonpc_value),
       mean = mean(nonpc_value)
     )
#11 valore negativos, valores de redondeo, los ponemos en 0
bilateral_nonpc <- bilateral_nonpc %>%
  mutate(nonpc_value = pmax(nonpc_value, 0))

#bilateral_nonpc tiene los valores de pc y non pc
```





---
```{r mlat-calculation}
# PCS: suma de instituciones PCS individuales
multilateral_pcs <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.MLAT.CD",
         ca_code %in% pcs_codes) %>%
  mutate(creditor_class = "Multilateral: PCS") %>%
  group_by(country_name, country_code, year, income_group) %>%
  summarise(pcs_value = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Total multilateral por país-año (WLD)
multilateral_total <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.MLAT.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, multilateral_total = value)

# Non-PCS = total - PCS
multilateral_nonpcs <- multilateral_total %>%
  left_join(multilateral_pcs, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  mutate(
    pcs_value = replace_na(pcs_value, 0),
    nonpcs_value = multilateral_total - pcs_value,
    nonpcs_value = pmax(nonpcs_value, 0)
  )

cat("Multilateral rows:", nrow(multilateral_nonpcs), "\n")
cat("Negativos:", sum(multilateral_nonpcs$nonpcs_value < 0), "\n")

```

---
```{r imf-bond-banks-other-calculation}
imf <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.DIMF.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, imf_value = value)

bonds <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.PBND.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, bonds_value = value)

comm_banks <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.PCBK.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, commbanks_value = value)

other_private <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.PROP.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, otherprivate_value = value)

total_ppg <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.DPPG.CD", ca_code == "WLD") %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, total_ppg_value = value)

cat("IMF:", nrow(imf), "| Bonds:", nrow(bonds), "| Banks:", nrow(comm_banks),
    "| Other Private:", nrow(other_private), "| Total PPG:", nrow(total_ppg), "\n")
```

---
```{r final-calculation}

final <- bilateral_nonpc %>%
  select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, 
         bilateral_total, pc_value, nonpc_value) %>%
  left_join(multilateral_nonpcs %>% select(country_name, year, 
         multilateral_total, pcs_value, nonpcs_value),
         by = c("country_name", "year")) %>%
  left_join(bonds, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  left_join(comm_banks, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  left_join(other_private, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  left_join(imf, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  left_join(total_ppg, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group"))

# Cross-check: nuestra suma vs total oficial
#IMF no se debe incluir como parte de PPG total

final <- final %>%
  mutate(
    our_sum = rowSums(select(., pc_value, nonpc_value, pcs_value, nonpcs_value,
                              bonds_value, commbanks_value, otherprivate_value), 
                      na.rm = TRUE),
    diff_pct = round((our_sum - total_ppg_value) / total_ppg_value * 100, 1)
  )

cat("Mediana diff:", median(final$diff_pct, na.rm = TRUE), "%\n")
cat("Dentro de ±1%:", sum(abs(final$diff_pct) <= 1, na.rm = TRUE), "de", nrow(final), "\n")
cat("Dentro de ±5%:", sum(abs(final$diff_pct) <= 5, na.rm = TRUE), "de", nrow(final), "\n")

```
```{r checks}
final %>%
  filter(abs(diff_pct) > 50) %>%
  select(country_name, year, our_sum, total_ppg_value, diff_pct) %>%
  arrange(desc(diff_pct)) %>%
  print(n = 20)

summary(final$diff_pct)

```

---
```{r excel-workbook}
wb_out <- createWorkbook()

wb_out <- createWorkbook()

# --- Data sheets ---

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Bilateral")
writeData(wb_out, "Bilateral",
  bilateral_nonpc %>%
    select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group,
           DT.DOD.BLAT.CD_total = bilateral_total,
           DT.DOD.BLAT.CD_pc = pc_value,
           DT.DOD.BLAT.CD_nonpc = nonpc_value) %>%
    arrange(country_name, year))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Multilateral")
writeData(wb_out, "Multilateral",
  multilateral_nonpcs %>%
    select(country_name, country_code, year, income_group,
           DT.DOD.MLAT.CD_total = multilateral_total,
           DT.DOD.MLAT.CD_pcs = pcs_value,
           DT.DOD.MLAT.CD_nonpcs = nonpcs_value) %>%
    arrange(country_name, year))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Bonds")
writeData(wb_out, "Bonds",
  bonds %>% arrange(country_name, year))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Commercial Banks")
writeData(wb_out, "Commercial Banks",
  comm_banks %>% arrange(country_name, year))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Other Private")
writeData(wb_out, "Other Private",
  other_private %>% arrange(country_name, year))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "IMF Credit")
writeData(wb_out, "IMF Credit",
  imf %>% arrange(country_name, year))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Total PPG")
writeData(wb_out, "Total PPG",
  total_ppg %>% arrange(country_name, year))

# --- Cross-check ---

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Cross-check")
writeData(wb_out, "Cross-check",
  final %>%
    select(country_name, year, income_group, our_sum, total_ppg_value, diff_pct) %>%
    arrange(country_name, year))

# --- Chart data: Sums (USD billions) ---

make_agg <- function(data, label) {
  data %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(
      Bilateral_PC = sum(pc_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      Bilateral_NonPC = sum(nonpc_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      Multilateral_PCS = sum(pcs_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      Multilateral_NonPCS = sum(nonpcs_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      Bonds = sum(bonds_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      Commercial_Banks = sum(commbanks_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      Other_Private = sum(otherprivate_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      IMF = sum(imf_value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e9,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(year)
}

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Chart - All (sum)")
writeData(wb_out, "Chart - All (sum)", make_agg(final, "All"))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Chart - LIC (sum)")
writeData(wb_out, "Chart - LIC (sum)", make_agg(final %>% filter(income_group == "LIC"), "LIC"))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Chart - MIC (sum)")
writeData(wb_out, "Chart - MIC (sum)", make_agg(final %>% filter(income_group == "MIC"), "MIC"))

# --- Chart data: Median shares (%) ---

make_median_pct <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    mutate(
      total = pc_value + nonpc_value + pcs_value + nonpcs_value +
              replace_na(bonds_value, 0) + replace_na(commbanks_value, 0) +
              replace_na(otherprivate_value, 0) + replace_na(imf_value, 0)
    ) %>%
    filter(total > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      pct_Bilateral_PC = pc_value / total * 100,
      pct_Bilateral_NonPC = nonpc_value / total * 100,
      pct_Multilateral_PCS = pcs_value / total * 100,
      pct_Multilateral_NonPCS = nonpcs_value / total * 100,
      pct_Bonds = replace_na(bonds_value, 0) / total * 100,
      pct_Commercial_Banks = replace_na(commbanks_value, 0) / total * 100,
      pct_Other_Private = replace_na(otherprivate_value, 0) / total * 100,
      pct_IMF = replace_na(imf_value, 0) / total * 100
    ) %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(across(starts_with("pct_"), ~median(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(year)
}

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Chart - All (median %)")
writeData(wb_out, "Chart - All (median %)", make_median_pct(final))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Chart - LIC (median %)")
writeData(wb_out, "Chart - LIC (median %)", make_median_pct(final %>% filter(income_group == "LIC")))

addWorksheet(wb_out, "Chart - MIC (median %)")
writeData(wb_out, "Chart - MIC (median %)", make_median_pct(final %>% filter(income_group == "MIC")))

# --- Reference ---

addWorksheet(wb_out, "PC Members")
writeData(wb_out, "PC Members", pc_mapping)

addWorksheet(wb_out, "PCS Institutions")
writeData(wb_out, "PCS Institutions",
  data.frame(ca_code = pcs_codes) %>%
    left_join(
      ids_long %>% filter(series_code == "DT.DOD.MLAT.CD") %>% distinct(ca_code, ca_name),
      by = "ca_code") %>%
    arrange(ca_name))

excel_file <- file.path(output_dir, "ex2_ppg_by_creditor_class.xlsx")
saveWorkbook(wb_out, excel_file, overwrite = TRUE)
cat("✓ Saved:", excel_file, "\n")

```

---
